description: Sanitized phrases for repeatable human acceptance testing. Exact private observations stay in .topher-local and are never committed.

cases.setup: Chrome is installed.
cases.expectedResult: Open Chrome exactly once without creating an unrelated tab.

cases.setup: Notes is installed.
cases.expectedResult: Open Notes exactly once.

cases.setup: Visual Studio Code is installed.
cases.expectedResult: Open Visual Studio Code exactly once.

cases.setup: Chrome is installed.
cases.expectedResult: Open one Google search for the complete query.

cases.setup: Chrome is installed.
cases.expectedResult: Open one YouTube search for dining with Derek.

cases.utterance: Search Chrome for Ball is Life.
cases.setup: Chrome is installed.
cases.expectedResult: Open one Google search for Ballislife without retaining 'Chrome for' in the query.
checks: Query resolves to the configured canonical term

cases.utterance: Go to YouTube, look for dining with Derek.
cases.setup: Chrome is installed.
cases.expectedResult: Treat the phrase as one YouTube search, not a compound request.

cases.setup: Chrome is installed.
cases.expectedResult: Open the canonical eBay homepage instead of a Google fallback.
checks: No guessed arbitrary domain is used

cases.setup: Chrome is installed.
cases.expectedResult: Open the canonical eBay homepage.

cases.setup: Any app is focused.
cases.expectedResult: Explain that the hold-to-dictate shortcut inserts text; execute nothing.

cases.setup: Any app is focused.
cases.expectedResult: Reject ambiguous bare prose without searching, opening, or typing.

cases.setup: Chrome may be open to YouTube.
cases.expectedResult: Explain that structured browser context is not implemented yet.
checks: No screen or page data is captured

cases.utterance: Topher helps me drive my Mac.
cases.setup: Focus an empty Notes text field and use the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Insert the sentence at the caret without pressing Return.

cases.utterance: I I think we should ship this today.
cases.setup: Focus an empty Notes text field and naturally repeat the first word while using the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Insert 'I think we should ship this today.' without the adjacent spoken restart.
checks: Only the repeated restart is removed

cases.utterance: I had had enough, but this is very very important.
cases.setup: Focus an empty Notes text field and use the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Preserve both intentional repetitions exactly as recognized.

cases.setup: Select one non-secure word in Notes and use the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Replace only the selected word and offer guarded Undo.

cases.setup: Focus a non-secure Chrome text input and use the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Insert once into the focused Chrome field and report verified insertion.

cases.utterance: Cross app dictation should work in this composer.
cases.setup: Focus an empty non-secure Codex or ChatGPT composer and use the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Insert once into the focused composer and report verified insertion without sending.

cases.utterance: This is a second dictated thought.
cases.setup: Focus the caret after a short single-line sentence already present in a non-secure Codex or ChatGPT composer.
cases.expectedResult: Append once with one separating space and report verified whole-value insertion without sending.
checks: Multiline or rich content is not used for this case

cases.utterance: I wish I could type my code out. And dictate everything sometimes.
cases.setup: Focus an empty field and speak one sentence with a brief natural pause before 'and dictate'.
cases.expectedResult: Insert one sentence ending with 'code out and dictate everything sometimes.' when Apple timing identifies a short pause.
checks: A deliberate long pause remains a sentence boundary

cases.utterance: Today I am working on UI slash UX changes.
cases.setup: Focus an empty field and use the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Insert 'Today I am working on UI/UX changes.'
checks: Lowercase literal uses of the word slash remain unchanged

cases.utterance: Topher can dictate into this Notion block.
cases.setup: Focus an empty non-secure Notion text block and use the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Insert once into the focused Notion block and report verified insertion without changing another block.

cases.setup: Focus a password field and use the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Refuse before capture and retain no transcript or preview.

cases.utterance: Read a natural paragraph continuously until Topher reaches its maximum dictation duration.
cases.setup: Focus a long-form Notes field and keep holding the dictation shortcut beyond two minutes.
cases.expectedResult: Automatically finalize and insert exactly once instead of discarding the transcript.
